title: MUSHIO: THE UNLIKELY HERO BUILT FROM A STINK BUG
summary: Photographer llunafalgas Lluna Falgàs and writer Miranda Remington trace an ongoing search for myth and narrative documenting their encounter with Tokyo-based costume designer Kameyama Mushio at his home-studio in Japan. Somewhere in Tokyo, an anonymous costume designer builds a hero out of a stink bug. Kameyama Mushio is a handmade, humanoid kamemushi, or…
content: MUSHIO: THE UNLIKELY HERO BUILT FROM A STINK BUG
